title: Adobe Dynamic Chat Interaction Details
description: Adobe Dynamic Chat (DC) transcript fields present on the raw transcript payload only (no fields invented beyond the connector sample). Apply alongside the base Interaction field group. Transcript-level keys id, leadId, leadEmail, and messages[] map to the base field group (conversationId, sourceMessageId, ExperienceEvent identityMap, interaction.content[]); this mixin carries the remaining top-level scalar attributes from the sample. Media and URLs embedded inside messages[] may be surfaced later via xdm:interaction.asset[] through post-ingestion ETL if the connector does not populate assets. For a full ExperienceEvent payload that composes the ExperienceEvent class with implementation-details, environment-details, web, interaction, and this field group, see experienceevent-interaction-dynamic-chat.example.full-experienceevent.json.

xdm:dynamicChatInteraction.title: Dynamic Chat Interaction
xdm:dynamicChatInteraction.description: Transcript envelope fields from the Dynamic Chat source payload. Property names align with the sample JSON keys (xdm-prefixed).

xdm:imsOrgId.title: IMS Organization ID
xdm:imsOrgId.description: Adobe IMS organization identifier from the transcript payload.

xdm:instanceId.title: Instance ID
xdm:instanceId.description: Dynamic Chat / Marketo instance identifier from the transcript payload.

xdm:playbookId.title: Playbook ID
xdm:playbookId.description: Playbook identifier associated with the dialogue session.

xdm:pageUrl.title: Page URL
xdm:pageUrl.description: URL of the page where the chat widget was hosted when the session occurred.

xdm:dialogueName.title: Dialogue Name
xdm:dialogueName.description: Human-readable name of the active dialogue.

xdm:leadTimeZone.title: Lead Time Zone
xdm:leadTimeZone.description: IANA time zone name for the lead (e.g. America/Los_Angeles).
